question: Write a C++ program that manages CGPA data for 10 students using arrays and pointers. Input CGPA values for 10 students, display all values, then calculate and display maximum CGPA, minimum CGPA, and average CGPA using pointer operations.

test_cases.expected:
Enter CGPA for 10 students:
Student 1: Student 2: Student 3: Student 4: Student 5: Student 6: Student 7: Student 8: Student 9: Student 10: 
CGPA values:
Student 1: 3.5
Student 2: 3.8
Student 3: 3.2
Student 4: 3.9
Student 5: 3.6
Student 6: 3.4
Student 7: 3.7
Student 8: 3.3
Student 9: 3.8
Student 10: 3.5

Results:
Maximum CGPA: 3.9
Minimum CGPA: 3.2
Average CGPA: 3.57

driver:
#include <iostream>
#include <fstream>
#include <sstream>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdlib>
using namespace std;
int main(){vector<pair<string,string>> tests={{"3.5
3.8
3.2
3.9
3.6
3.4
3.7
3.3
3.8
3.5
","Enter CGPA for 10 students:
Student 1: Student 2: Student 3: Student 4: Student 5: Student 6: Student 7: Student 8: Student 9: Student 10: 
CGPA values:
Student 1: 3.5
Student 2: 3.8
Student 3: 3.2
Student 4: 3.9
Student 5: 3.6
Student 6: 3.4
Student 7: 3.7
Student 8: 3.3
Student 9: 3.8
Student 10: 3.5

Results:
Maximum CGPA: 3.9
Minimum CGPA: 3.2
Average CGPA: 3.57
"}};int compile_status=system("g++ student.cpp -o student.out 2> compile_log.txt");if(compile_status!=0){cout<<"Compilation failed!";return 0;}int passed=0;for(auto &t:tests){ofstream fin("input.txt");fin<<t.first;fin.close();system("./student.out < input.txt > output.txt 2>> runtime_log.txt");ifstream fout("output.txt");stringstream buffer;buffer<<fout.rdbuf();string out=buffer.str();fout.close();if(out==t.second)passed++;}cout<<passed<<"/"<<tests.size();return 0;}

errors.description: Poor formatting: Multiple declarations on one line with cryptic variable names 'a' and 'p'.
Entire for loop on one line severely reduces readability.
Inefficient algorithm: Using three separate loops instead of a single pass to find max, min, and sum.
Poor formatting: No space before [] in delete[] operator.
